honeywellExperion.description: Distributed control system for process industries

abbSystem800xA.name: ABB System 800xA
abbSystem800xA.description: Extended automation system for industrial processes

emersonDeltaV.name: Emerson DeltaV
emersonDeltaV.description: Modern DCS with digital transformation capabilities

ovalFlowpetLsf41.title: OVAL FLOWPET LSF41 Positive Displacement Flow Meter
ovalFlowpetLsf41.description: High-precision OVAL FLOWPET LSF41 positive displacement flow meter with exceptional accuracy. Features superior repeatability, wide diameter range, and premium material construction for demanding liquid measurement applications.
features: Wide diameter range: DN15 to DN200 (1/2" to 8")
Multiple process connections: Flanged (JIS, ANSI, DIN), Threaded
Premium materials: SUS316, SUS316L, Hastelloy C-276

badgerMeterM1000.title: Badger Meter M1000 Nutating Disc Flow Meter
badgerMeterM1000.description: Reliable Badger Meter M1000 nutating disc positive displacement flow meter with advanced metering technology. Features exceptional accuracy, multiple communication options, and robust construction for water utility applications.
features: Diameter range: DN15 to DN100 (5/8" to 4")
Multiple process connections: Flanged (ANSI), NPT, Compression
Robust materials: Bronze, Cast Iron, 316L SST

krohneBm100PdMeter.title: KROHNE BM 100 Positive Displacement Oval Gear Flow Meter
krohneBm100PdMeter.description: High-performance KROHNE BM 100 positive displacement oval gear flow meter with advanced measurement technology. Features exceptional accuracy, superior repeatability, and multi-protocol communication for industrial applications.
features: Wide diameter range: DN10 to DN200 (3/8" to 8")
Multiple process connections: Flanged (DIN, ANSI), Threaded
Versatile materials: Aluminium, Cast Iron, 316L SST

kralVolumeterOmg.title: KRAL VoluMeter OMG Positive Displacement Screw Flow Meter
kralVolumeterOmg.description: Precision KRAL VoluMeter OMG positive displacement screw flow meter with exceptional measurement accuracy. Features superior repeatability, multi-protocol communication, and MID certification for custody transfer applications.
features: Diameter range: DN15 to DN150 (1/2" to 6")
Multiple process connections: Flanged (DIN, ANSI), Threaded
Robust materials: Aluminium, Cast Steel, 316L SST
ATEX, IECEx, FM, CSA, MID certified

flowTechnologyDcISeries.title: Flow Technology DC-I Series Positive Displacement Helical Gear Flow Meter
flowTechnologyDcISeries.description: Advanced Flow Technology DC-I Series positive displacement helical gear flow meter designed for high-viscosity fluids. Features ultra-wide viscosity range, exceptional accuracy, and specialty materials for demanding chemical and petrochemical applications.
features: Compact diameter range: DN6 to DN50 (1/4" to 2")
Ultra-wide flow range: 0.001-400 GPM (depending on size)
Multiple process connections: Flanged (ANSI), NPT, BSP
Specialty materials: 316 SST, Hastelloy C, PPS

danfossKp36.title: Danfoss KP36 Pressure Switch
danfossKp36.description: Industrial pressure switch with snap-action electrical contacts for reliable operation in steam, air, and liquid media applications.
features: SPDT contact system for reliable switching
Suitable for gaseous and liquid media

schneider9013fsg2j24m4.title: Schneider Electric 9013FSG2J24M4 Pumptrol Switch
schneider9013fsg2j24m4.description: Square D Pumptrol pressure switch with low-pressure cut-off for pump applications up to 1.5 HP.

wikaPsm760.title: WIKA PSM-760 Programmable Pressure Switch
wikaPsm760.description: Programmable electronic pressure switch with 4-20mA output and digital display for precise pressure monitoring and control applications.

abb266dsh.title: ABB 266DSH Differential Pressure Switch
abb266dsh.description: Explosion-proof differential pressure switch with NEMA 7 enclosure for hazardous area applications requiring reliable pressure differential monitoring.

ashcroftB424b.title: Ashcroft B424B Heavy Duty Pressure Switch
ashcroftB424b.description: Heavy-duty industrial pressure switch with SPDT contacts and rugged construction for reliable operation in demanding applications.

endressFtl31.title: Endress+Hauser FTL31 Liquiphant Level Switch
endressFtl31.description: Tuning fork point-level switch for liquid level detection with active sensor technology for overfill prevention and pump protection.
features: Tuning fork technology with piezoelectric drive
Active sensor technology ensures device functionality
No adjustment needed for different media

abbLsSeries.title: ABB LS Series Mechanical Level Switch
abbLsSeries.description: Rugged mechanical float level switch with hermetically sealed switching mechanism for reliable liquid point-level detection.
features: Most rugged design in industrial marketplace
Available in flanged or insertion models

vegaVegaswing61.title: VEGA VEGASWING 61 Vibrating Rod Level Switch
vegaVegaswing61.description: Universal vibrating rod level switch for point level detection in liquids and bulk solids with compact design and G1 process connection.
features: Universal for liquids and bulk solids

siemens7ml12Pointflex.title: Siemens 7ML12 Point flex Capacitance Level Switch
siemens7ml12Pointflex.description: Capacitance point level switch with universal power supply and IP66/67 protection for reliable liquid level detection in industrial applications.

magnetrolEchotel961.title: Magnetrol Echotel 961/962 Ultrasonic Level Switch
magnetrolEchotel961.description: Non-contact ultrasonic level switch with 4-20mA output for liquid level detection without physical contact with the process media.

omronWlca12Y.title: Omron WLCA12-Y Heavy-Duty Limit Switch
omronWlca12Y.description: Heavy-duty roller lever limit switch with IP67 rating and die-cast metal housing for harsh industrial environments.

schneiderXcmd21f0l1.title: Schneider Electric XCMD21F0L1 OsiSense Limit Switch
schneiderXcmd21f0l1.description: Standard format limit switch from the OsiSense XC range with flexible roller lever actuator for industrial automation.
features: Part of OsiSense XC Standard range

schneiderXckpLimitSwitch.title: Schneider Electric XCKP Plastic Limit Switch
schneiderXckpLimitSwitch.description: Compact plastic limit switch with roller plunger actuator, 2NC+2NO contacts, and IP67 protection for industrial automation applications.

abbLs30p.title: ABB LS30P Thermoplastic Limit Switch
abbLs30p.description: Thermoplastic housing limit switch with snap action mechanism and IP66 protection for reliable position sensing in industrial applications.

eatonE51LimitSwitch.title: Eaton E51 Heavy Duty Limit Switch
eatonE51LimitSwitch.description: Heavy-duty limit switch with side rotary actuator, 4-pole configuration, and IP67 protection for demanding industrial environments.

schneiderXb4ba21.title: Schneider Electric XB4BA21 Harmony Push Button
schneiderXb4ba21.description: 22mm metal push button with chromium-plated bezel from the Harmony XB4 series for industrial control panels.

eatonM22DrR.title: Eaton M22-DR-R Emergency Stop Push Button
eatonM22DrR.description: 22mm emergency stop push button with red mushroom head and twist-to-release mechanism for safety applications.
features: Red mushroom head for emergency stop

schneiderXb5Harmony.title: Schneider Electric Harmony XB5 LED Push Button
schneiderXb5Harmony.description: 22mm illuminated push button with integrated LED, metal construction, and IP65 protection for control panel applications.

abbCp110g.title: ABB CP1-10G Green Flush Push Button
abbCp110g.description: Green flush push button with 1NO+1NC contacts and IP65 protection for start/run control applications in industrial panels.

siemens3su1Pushbutton.title: Siemens 3SU1 Illuminated Push Button
siemens3su1Pushbutton.description: Illuminated push button with metal bezel, 24V operation, and IP67 protection for industrial control and signaling applications.

fisherEdControlValve.title: Fisher easy-e™ ED Globe Control Valve
fisherEdControlValve.description: Balanced valve plug globe control valve with cage guiding and metal-to-metal seating for reliable process control.

samson3241GlobeValve.title: SAMSON Type 3241 Globe Control Valve
samson3241GlobeValve.description: Industrial pneumatic globe valve for process engineering with modular design and exchangeable trims for different flow characteristics.
features: SAM DIGITAL ready with predictive diagnostics

fisher657SizeReducer.title: Fisher Type 657 Size Reducer Control Valve
fisher657SizeReducer.description: Spring-and-diaphragm actuated size reducer control valve for compact installations requiring excellent flow control in smaller pipe sizes.
features: Size reducer design for compact installation

masoneilan41000Globe.title: Masoneilan 41000 Series Globe Control Valve
masoneilan41000Globe.description: Pneumatic globe control valve with balanced trim design for severe service applications requiring precision flow control and tight shutoff.
features: Globe valve design for precise control

samson3241PneumaticGlobeValve.title: SAMSON 3241 Pneumatic Globe Valve
samson3241PneumaticGlobeValve.description: Pneumatic globe control valve with guided stem design for reliable process control in DN15-300 sizes with excellent flow characteristics.

asco8262h112dc24.title: ASCO 8262H112DC24 General Service Solenoid Valve
asco8262h112dc24.description: 2-way normally closed solenoid valve in stainless steel construction for air, water, light oil, and fuel gas applications.

parkerS4aSolenoidValve.title: Parker S4A Series Refrigeration Solenoid Valve
parkerS4aSolenoidValve.description: Solenoid valve designed for refrigeration and fluid control systems, compatible with multiple refrigerants and built for wide pressure ranges.
features: Compatible with R410A, R448A, R449A, R450A, R507A

asco8210g094.title: ASCO 8210G094 2-Way NC Solenoid Valve
asco8210g094.description: 2-way normally closed brass solenoid valve with 1/2 NPT connection and 120VAC coil for general service applications.

burkert6013.title: Bürkert Type 6013 Direct-Acting Solenoid Valve
burkert6013.description: Direct-acting 2/2-way solenoid valve with FKM seal and 24VDC coil for precise fluid control in process applications.

parker71215sn2vn00.title: Parker 71215SN2VN00 Normally Open Solenoid Valve
parker71215sn2vn00.description: Normally open stainless steel solenoid valve with 1/4 inch connection and 12VDC coil for specialized control applications.

fisherV150VeeBallValve.title: Fisher V150 Vee-Ball On/Off Valve
fisherV150VeeBallValve.description: Fisher V150 Vee-Ball valve with V-notch ball for reliable on-off or throttling service. Features splined valve shaft for rotary actuators, raised-face flanged construction, and materials compliant with NACE MR0175-2 for sour service.

fisherV280BallValve.title: Fisher V280 Full-Bore Ball Control Valve
fisherV280BallValve.description: Heavy-duty Fisher V280 three-piece trunnion mounted full-bore ball valve for on-off service. Handles full CL900 pressure drops with optional drilled attenuator for noise/vibration control. Fire-safe design with NACE compliant materials.

flowserveWorcesterF519BallValve.title: Flowserve Worcester F519 ASA150 Ball Valve
flowserveWorcesterF519BallValve.description: Worcester F519 ASA150 flanged ball valve with floating ball design. Third party approved to BS 5351 with fire testing to BS EN 10497. Features ISO 5211 actuator mounting, anti-blowout stem, and anti-static design.

flowserveWorcesterSeries44BallValve.title: Flowserve Worcester Series 44 Three-Piece Ball Valve
flowserveWorcesterSeries44BallValve.description: Industry-leading Worcester Series 44 three-piece ball valve designed to ANSI B16.34 specifications. Features advanced seat technology for bubble-tight shutoff, can be configured for on-off or throttling control applications.

swagelokSs43gs4BallValve.title: Swagelok SS-43GS4 40G Series Ball Valve
swagelokSs43gs4BallValve.description: Swagelok SS-43GS4 stainless steel one-piece instrumentation ball valve for on-off quarter-turn service. Features 3,000 PSI rating, enhanced thermal cycling capability, -65°F to 300°F range, and inline packing adjustments.

burkert2655BallValve.title: Burkert Type 2655 Pneumatic Ball Valve
burkert2655BallValve.description: Burkert Type 2655 three-piece ball valve with Type 2050 pneumatic rotary actuator for on-off operation. Features ISO 5211 standard interface, linear piston with quick-acting coupling, and 2/2-way operation for shutoff and flow distribution.

atomberg-efficio-1200-bldc.title: Atomberg Efficio 1200mm BLDC Ceiling Fan
atomberg-efficio-1200-bldc.description: Premium energy-efficient BLDC ceiling fan by Atomberg with only 27W power consumption and 236 CMM airflow. Features superior service value of 8.7, RF remote control, and 65% energy savings compared to traditional fans.
features: RF remote with boost & sleep modes

havells-efficiencia-neo-1200.title: Havells Efficiencia Neo 1200mm BLDC Ceiling Fan
havells-efficiencia-neo-1200.description: Award-winning BLDC ceiling fan by Havells with 26W power consumption and 220 CMM airflow. Winner of National Energy Conservation Award 2021, featuring 100% copper winding and advanced control modes.
features: RF remote with 4 modes (Boost, Sleep, Breeze, Mop)

superfan-superx1-1200-bldc.title: Superfan SuperX1 1200mm BLDC Ceiling Fan
superfan-superx1-1200-bldc.description: India's first BLDC ceiling fan by Superfan with 35W power consumption and ultra-wide voltage range of 90-300V. Features 5-year warranty, drop-safe remote, and natural breeze mode for optimal comfort.

bldc-deluxe1600.title: Deluxe BLDC Ceiling Fan 1600mm
bldc-deluxe1600.description: Top-of-the-line 80W brushless DC ceiling fan with 1600mm sweep diameter. Premium features including smart controls, advanced aerodynamics, and exceptional build quality for luxury applications.

bldc-industrial1800.title: Industrial BLDC Ceiling Fan 1800mm
bldc-industrial1800.description: Extra-large 100W brushless DC ceiling fan designed for large industrial spaces. Maximum airflow capacity with heavy-duty construction for 24/7 operation in demanding industrial environments.

bldc-economy900.title: Economy BLDC Ceiling Fan 900mm
bldc-economy900.description: Affordable 35W brushless DC ceiling fan with 900mm sweep diameter. Energy-efficient design perfect for small to medium rooms with basic remote control and reliable performance.

bldc-exhaust-fan-motor.title: BLDC Exhaust Fan Motor 25W
bldc-exhaust-fan-motor.description: High-efficiency 25W brushless DC motor for exhaust fan applications. Features ball bearing construction, IP44 protection, and quiet operation for residential and commercial ventilation systems.

bldc-cooler-motors.title: BLDC Cooler Motor 45W
bldc-cooler-motors.description: Powerful 45W brushless DC motor for air cooler applications. Advanced design with 90% efficiency, variable speed control, and enhanced protection rating for reliable cooling performance.

bldc-ventilation-system.title: BLDC Ventilation System 75W
bldc-ventilation-system.description: Industrial-grade 75W brushless DC motor for ventilation systems. Superior efficiency at 92%, high airflow capacity, and robust construction for demanding HVAC applications.

bldc-ventilation-motors.title: BLDC Ventilation Motor 35W
bldc-ventilation-motors.description: Efficient 35W brushless DC motor for ventilation applications. Balanced performance with 280 CFM airflow capacity, suitable for residential and light commercial ventilation systems.

bldc-industrial-exhaust.title: Industrial BLDC Exhaust Fan 120W
bldc-industrial-exhaust.description: High-power 120W brushless DC motor for industrial exhaust applications. Heavy-duty construction with exceptional airflow capacity and reliability for demanding industrial environments.

bldc-mini-cooler.title: Mini BLDC Cooler Motor 15W
bldc-mini-cooler.description: Compact 15W brushless DC motor designed for mini cooler applications. Energy-efficient design with quiet operation and reliable performance for personal cooling devices.

dc-surface-pump-2hp.title: DC Surface Pump 2HP
dc-surface-pump-2hp.description: Powerful 2HP DC surface pump with self-priming capability. High flow rate of 3600 LPH with 150ft head capacity, perfect for agriculture and industrial water transfer applications.

hybrid-bldc-pump.title: Hybrid BLDC Pump System
hybrid-bldc-pump.description: Advanced hybrid BLDC pump system combining DC and AC operation capabilities. Features 1.5HP power with 2700 LPH flow rate and 120ft head capacity, perfect for versatile water pumping applications.

bldc-table-fan-motors.title: BLDC Table Fan Motors
bldc-table-fan-motors.description: High-efficiency BLDC table fan motors with 28W power consumption and 2100 RPM speed. Features remote control operation and 400mm diameter for optimal air circulation in residential and commercial spaces.

bldc-wall-fan-motors.title: BLDC Wall Fan Motors
bldc-wall-fan-motors.description: Powerful BLDC wall fan motors with 35W power and 1800 RPM speed. Features 450mm diameter and oscillation capability for effective wall-mounted air circulation in various indoor environments.
features: Oscillation feature for better air distribution

bldc-pedestal-fan-motors.title: BLDC Pedestal Fan Motors
bldc-pedestal-fan-motors.description: High-efficiency BLDC pedestal fan motors with adjustable height and oscillation. Powerful airflow with energy-efficient operation for residential and commercial spaces.

power-distribution-cables.title: Power Distribution Cables
power-distribution-cables.description: Heavy-duty power distribution cables with XLPE insulation for reliable electrical power transmission. Available in voltage ranges from 1kV to 33kV with copper or aluminum conductors for various industrial applications.
features: Suitable for underground and overhead installation

communication-cables.title: Communication Cables
communication-cables.description: High-performance Category 6A communication cables with 500 MHz bandwidth for advanced networking applications. F/UTP shielding ensures reliable data transmission in demanding environments.

mcb-circuit-breakers.title: MCB Miniature Circuit Breakers
mcb-circuit-breakers.description: Reliable MCB miniature circuit breakers for overload and short-circuit protection. Available in current ranges from 6A to 63A with multiple pole configurations for comprehensive electrical protection.

mccb-circuit-breakers.title: MCCB Molded Case Circuit Breakers
mccb-circuit-breakers.description: Heavy-duty MCCB molded case circuit breakers for high-current applications. Available from 16A to 1600A with 50kA breaking capacity for reliable protection in industrial electrical systems.

industrial-fuses.title: Industrial HRC Fuses
industrial-fuses.description: High-rupturing capacity (HRC) industrial fuses for overcurrent protection. Available from 2A to 800A with voltage ranges up to 11kV and 80kA breaking capacity for critical industrial protection.
features: HRC type for high breaking capacity

terminal-blocks.title: Industrial Terminal Blocks
terminal-blocks.description: Versatile terminal blocks for secure electrical connections in industrial control panels. Available in screw and spring clamp types with current ratings from 10A to 150A and DIN rail mounting.
features: Screw and spring clamp terminal types

industrial-connectors.title: Industrial Heavy Duty Connectors
industrial-connectors.description: Heavy-duty industrial connectors designed for harsh environments. Available with 3-128 pins, current ratings up to 400A, and IP67 protection for reliable connections in demanding applications.

signal-connectors.title: Signal Connectors
signal-connectors.description: Miniature signal connectors for precise data transmission in control and instrumentation applications. Features 2-50 pin configurations with 360° EMI shielding for signal integrity.

omron-e2e-x5me1-pnp-proximity.title: Omron E2E-X5ME1 PNP Proximity Sensor
omron-e2e-x5me1-pnp-proximity.description: High-performance Omron PNP inductive proximity sensor with 5mm sensing distance. Features PNP NO/NC output, IP67 protection, and M12 connector for reliable industrial automation applications.

pepperl-fuchs-nbb5-18gm60-e2-pnp.title: Pepperl+Fuchs NBB5-18GM60-E2 PNP Sensor
pepperl-fuchs-nbb5-18gm60-e2-pnp.description: Industrial-grade Pepperl+Fuchs PNP inductive proximity sensor with 5mm sensing range. Features IP68 protection, ATEX certification, and 5000Hz switching frequency for harsh environment applications.

variant.descriptionDefault: Industrial product variant {{number}} with enhanced specifications

defaultProduct.descriptionTemplate: Industrial {{subcategory}} product designed for reliable performance in demanding applications. Features high-quality construction and proven technology.
